source: Emirates Cabin Safety Document v110, March 2026
notes: Per registration, three independent attributes are captured: aircraft type, CRC presence/type, and crew rest curtains availability.
When both a CRC and crew rest curtains exist on the same airframe, the Purser may choose either as the rest facility for that flight.
The doc lists A6-EUG and A6-EVF in two columns (4C-484 LOWER DECK CRC and 3C-516 LOWER DECK CRC). This file resolves them to 3C-516 — verify with EK fleet ops if needed.
A350 doc page does not include a "Crew rest curtains" row — interpreted as no crew rest curtains on either A350 variant.
Starlink WiFi marker (* in source doc) captured as starlink:true on affected B777 frames.
fcType:"fully-enclosed-suites" on the Game Changer (B777-300ER 4C-324). jcType:"falcon-seats" on B777-200LR variants.

schema.type: Aircraft type code: A350 | A380 | B777
schema.configuration: Class layout F/J/PE/Y or J/PE/Y or J/Y
schema.fcType: First Class type when applicable, e.g., "fully-enclosed-suites"
schema.jcType: Business Class type when applicable, e.g., "falcon-seats"
